extract: Maushold (Japanese: イッカネズミ Ikkanezumi) is a Normal-type Pokémon introduced in Generation IX. It evolves from Tandemaus when leveled up in a battle starting at level 25. Maushold has two separate forms: Family of Four and Family of Three. When Tandemaus evolves, it has a 1/100 chance of evolving into Family of Three Maushold. (Refer to Game data→Form data for more details.)
